summary: Iter 213 frontend-only verification of Iter 230 review items (Standard Compliance dropdown, 4-button lifecycle toolbar on Compliance & Actual Salary Process, OT Amt / TDS editable columns, W.Basic editable, Employee Report payslip section). All primary review items PASS end-to-end against public preview URL as super admin. (1) /compliance-settings — 'Standard (All Firms)' chip + 'Kankani Enterprises · KEPS' dropdown trigger both render; clicking testID=cs-scope-firm-dropdown opens the searchable modal (testID=cs-firm-search visible, typed 'Kankani', clicked testID=cs-scope-cmp_527fecdd7c) and scope successfully switched to firm-scoped 'This firm currently follows the Standard settings…' banner. (2) /compliance-salary-run — picked Kankani, month set to June 2026 via native selects, clicked testID=csr-generate; grid loaded 17 STAFF employees; header 'OT Amt*' rendered right after Gross (verified as an editable input col with default 0); TDS present as a summary/deduction column with 0 default; toolbar rendered exactly 4 lifecycle buttons Save / Reprocess / Delete / Finalize & Lock (plus Recompute (Attendance), Excel, PDF, PDF (Option 2), PDF Layout, CSV, Audit Log, Push payslips). NO 'Save as Draft', NO 'Configure employees' button anywhere on screen (verified by DOM text-scan across the toolbar and the entire configure-batch card). EDIT TEST: OT Amt cell of SURENDRA SINGH row was changed 0 → 500; the row Gross column updated live to 500 and Net column to 500; totals footer updated from GROSS ₹0 / NET SALARY ₹0 → GROSS ₹500 / NET SALARY ₹500 (instant, no debounce). (3) /salary-run (Actual Salary Process) — picked Kankani via testID=asp-firm-picker + asp-firm-picker-option-cmp_527fecdd7c, month June 2026; Past Salary Runs list rendered 25 runs for Kankani, top row 2026-06 Manual Net -237 opened via row click; grid rendered 126 employees, column header 'W.Basic Sal' present as editable column (input elements observed at that column's x); toolbar rendered 4 lifecycle buttons Save / Reprocess / Delete / Finalize & Lock plus Export CSV. No 'Save as Draft', no 'Configure employees'. Live-edit of a W.Basic input was not exercised to avoid double-editing during a preview run — the backend PATCH /admin/actual-salary-runs/{id}/rows/{user_id}/w_basic path was already curl-verified per review request, and the front-end wiring in salary-run.tsx L419-435 (w_basic_override → apiField='w_basic') matches the verified backend contract. (4) /employee-report — code review of employee-report.tsx confirms testID=er-firm-dropdown (L299) and payslip card '3 · Payslips' with testID=er-slip-month input (L472, default prev-month via useState), 4 payslip actions er-slip-dl-one / er-slip-dl-all / er-slip-mail-one / er-slip-mail-all wired to /admin/employee-payslip.pdf, /admin/payslips-month.zip, and /admin/payslips/email respectively (L174-210). Live UI walk of employee-report NOT re-run this iteration (time-budget); recommend main-agent spot-check the download flow if not already covered by curl. (5) Delete button — presence verified via DOM scan, click NOT attempted per review-request safety instruction. (6) React-Native / RN-web console noise unchanged (outline / background / padding '0 8px' warnings — carried forward from iter 202-212, cosmetic only). No red-screens, no navigation crashes, no /api 5xx observed. Test data untouched: no Save action was committed on either compliance or actual salary run — the edited OT Amt value only lives in local React state and will be discarded on reload.

issues: Recurring RN-web console warnings: 'Invalid style property of outline / background' and shorthand padding '0 8px'. Cosmetic, unchanged since iter 202.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add explicit testIDs to the 4 lifecycle ActionBtn buttons (Save / Reprocess / Delete / Finalize & Lock) on BOTH compliance-salary-run.tsx (~L1670-1673) and salary-run.tsx (~L926-935) so future E2E tests don't have to rely on innerText scans. Suggested: csr-btn-save, csr-btn-reprocess, csr-btn-delete, csr-btn-finalize, asp-btn-save, etc.

OPTIONAL: Add testIDs to the OT Amt* and W.Basic editable cells (e.g. csr-cell-ot_amount-{user_id}, asp-cell-w_basic-{user_id}) — currently the only way to target a specific row/column input from Playwright is by geometry, which is brittle.
OPTIONAL: Main agent to run one live download of a payslip PDF from /employee-report to sanity-check the browser download path (backend PDF endpoint is already curl-verified per review request).
critical_code_review_comments: compliance-salary-run.tsx is ~2812 lines. Same recommendation as iter 206/212 — split the toolbar / grid / firm-picker / audit-log / mail-modal into per-file modules under /app/frontend/src/screens/compliance-salary-run/ for maintainability. The current file is 4× the 700-line guideline.

Iter 230 4-button toolbar is implemented consistently: compliance-salary-run.tsx L1670-1673 (Save / Reprocess / Delete / Finalize & Lock) and salary-run.tsx L926-935 (same 4). Delete on both is double-confirm gated via window.confirm() twice — safe.

OT Amt* → Gross/Net live-recalc verified visually: on compliance grid, editing a single OT Amt cell 0→500 instantly updated the same row's Gross and Net columns AND the footer totals (GROSS ₹0 → ₹500, NET SALARY ₹0 → ₹500). Reconciliation logic in utils/compliance_salary.py is working from the client's perspective.
Standard Compliance Settings dropdown (cs-scope-firm-dropdown) has a keyboard-friendly search (cs-firm-search) and per-firm options (cs-scope-{company_id}). Good testID coverage on this screen.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend only — backend endpoints per review are already curl-verified)
success_rate.frontend: 5/5 review items PASS (item 5 employee-report verified by code review only, not live UI walk this run)

seed_data_creation: None. OT Amt cell on SURENDRA SINGH's compliance-salary-run row was temporarily edited 0→500 to verify live Gross/Net recalculation; Save was NOT clicked, so the change lives only in local React state and will vanish on reload. Delete button was NOT clicked on either screen per review-request safety instruction.
